name: usb-cam-v2
description: Android USB Camera App – 100% local, no cloud, no tracking

scripts.android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.build:apk: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.build:apk:debug: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
